name: boltdb-go Persistent Backdoor (Go Module)
description: Typosquat of boltdb/bolt Go module. Backdoor hidden in db.go and cursor.go with persistent C2 connection. Exploited Go Module Mirror caching for 3+ years undetected. Git tag altered after caching to hide malware from code review.

affected_packages.name: github.com/boltdb-go/bolt
affected_packages.note: Entirely malicious. Legitimate package is github.com/boltdb/bolt or go.etcd.io/bbolt

remediation: Check go.sum for boltdb-go: grep boltdb-go go.sum
Audit systems for persistent C2 connections
